title: Moving the Capital to Thang Long
summary: King Ly Thai To saw a vision of a golden dragon rising and decided to move the capital from Hoa Lu to the new land of Thang Long.

slides.text: Although Hoa Lu was beautiful, it was cramped. King Ly Thai To wanted to find a larger place for the country to develop strongly. He turned his attention to the land of Dai La.
slides.imagePrompt: King Ly Thai To on a ship traveling across a wide river, looking at a beautiful landscape, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: According to the legned, when the King's boat arrived at Dai La, he saw a miraculous sight: A Golden Dragon soaring into the high sky!
slides.imagePrompt: A majestic golden dragon made of clouds or light rising from the river bank towards the sky, King and soldiers pointing in awe, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Seeing this as a good omen, the King decided to move the capital here and named the land 'Thang Long' (meaning 'Rising Dragon').
slides.imagePrompt: Ancient city construction scene, stone walls rising, the name 'THANG LONG' written in golden characters in the sky, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Thang Long became a bustling center, a gathering place for talented and patriotic people until today (Hanoi!).
slides.imagePrompt: Busy and happy market in ancient Thang Long, colorful stalls, people trading, pagodas in the background, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: Why did King Ly Thai To name the new capital Thang Long?
options: Because he saw a dragon rising
Because it was the name of a flower
slides.answer: Because he saw a dragon rising

slides.question: What city is Thang Long today?
What year did King Ly Thai To move the capital?
